title: Upon Fone A Schoolmaster. Epig.
content:
Fone says, those mighty whiskers he does wear
    Are twigs of birch, and willow, growing there:
    If so, we'll think too, when he does condemn
    Boys to the lash, that he does whip with them.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Fone A Schoolmaster. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
